name: Sun
description: The `sun` component allows you to track the sun's position in the sky. Calculations are done every 60 seconds.

config_entries.label: Latitude
config_entries.description: The latitude for performing the calculation.

config_entries.label: Longitude
config_entries.description: The longitude for performing the calculation.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.
